Made from high-quality material, this jumpsuit is a must-have in any woman's wardrobe for a fashionable and effortless outfit option.

title: Levi's Women's Long Sleeve Heritage Jumpsuit
description: •A one-and-done jumpsuit •Cut with a standard fit •Crafted with soft cotton •Long sleeves Description The definition of a one-and-done fit. Our Long-Sleeve Jumpsuit features an easy standard fit and was crafted with soft cotton. In 1873, Levi's invented the blue jean.
